name: Fruit-Topped Canapes
recipeInstructions: Beat cream cheese at medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth. Add orange rind, orange juice, and ground ginger, mixing well. Spoon mixture into a decorating bag fitted with tip No. 18, and pipe mixture onto crackers. Set aside. Cut fruit into various shapes and decorate crackers as desired with fruit and mint leaves. Yield: 4 dozen.
